description: NorthStar Health market intelligence MCP server (sales, margin, growth, market share, forecast), computed in-process from static datasets.

tools.name: get_sales
tools.description: Query annual sales rows, optionally filtered by market, category, product, brand and year.

tools.name: get_market_share
tools.description: Return market-share by brand for a market (and optional category/year).

tools.name: get_growth_rates
tools.description: Return average annual growth rates by category (and optional market).

tools.name: compare_margins
tools.description: Compare average gross margin for a category across markets.

tools.name: get_forecast
tools.description: Return the forecast (projection) rows for a market, aggregated by year.

tools.name: competitor_performance
tools.description: Return brand-level performance (revenue, units, share) for competitors.
